seo.title: Middletown NY Real Estate | Jin Pang
seo.description: Search luxury homes in Middletown, NY. Top-rated schools, Tudor estates, 16 miles to Midtown. Median price $2.1M. Jin Pang.

name: Middletown
tagline: The Crown Jewel of Orange County
overview: Middletown is Orange County's most prestigious village — a tightly-held community of grand Tudor and Colonial estates set on tree-canopied streets just 16 miles from Midtown Manhattan. With one of the top-rated school districts in the state, a quaint village center, and an extraordinarily loyal resident base, Middletown consistently commands Orange County's highest prices.
